article.body_preview:
DHAKA, BANGLADESH - Media OutReach - 2 February 2023 - ShopUp, the largest full-stack B2B commerce platform in Bangladesh, announces a major milestone in securing $30 million in debt financing. The funds will be used to drive expansion efforts and strengthen the company's supply chain operations, benefiting small businesses and consumers across the country.

The $30 million financing round was comprised of $20 million from Lendable, the global provider of debt to fintech companies in emerging ma

llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly states the funds will strengthen ShopUp's supply chain operations and last-mile logistics, which directly pertains to logistics performance described by the Delivery feature.

llm_connections.evidence_quote: The funds will also help address the significant food waste issue in Bangladesh, with over 30% of production going to waste, by implementing a seamless distribution system
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article links the funds to implementing a nationwide distribution system to address over 30% of production going to waste, matching inventory_proxy's scope of unsold or wasted stock.
